holdings.infoBox: QTR is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.15%, Apple at 6.88%, Micron Technology at 5.34%, Microsoft at 4.70%, and Amazon.com at 4.17%.

overview.description: The Global X NASDAQ 100 Tail Risk ETF (QTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of NASDAQ 100 stocks and aims to protect the fund from significant negative movements or tail risk by purchasing quarterly Index put options. QTR was launched on Aug 25, 2021 and is issued by Global X.
